gpssampling 0.2.0

Learn

Source: vignettes/learn.Rmd
learn.Rmd

Welcome to the Learn GPS Sampling manual. You will find here full documentation and tutorials for learning to use GPS Sampling.

Before starting using GPS Sampling, you may be interested in knowing what is GPS Sampling about and why GPS Sampling was created.

If you are not familiar with GPS Sampling, have a look at the Getting started page.

Tutorials

Step-by-step tutorials of how to use GPS Sampling, in the form of case studies. These tutorials are adapted from training materials originally developed by Epicentre (MSF).

  • Prepare a geographic sample

    • By random sampling of roofs
    • By spatial sampling
    • By spatial sampling supervised

For any questions or suggestions, please use the issue tracker: https://github.com/epicentre-msf/gpssampling/issues.

Developed by Yves Amevoin, Claude (Anthropic AI).

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
